steps.title: Identify exponential growth pattern
steps.content: Exponential growth follows the form $$y = a \cdot b^t$$, where $a$ is the initial amount and $b$ is the growth factor. Since the bacteria double every hour, the growth factor $b = 2$. The initial amount $a = 66{,}000$.

steps.title: Match to correct formula structure
steps.content: Plug the known values into the exponential form: $$y = 66{,}000 \cdot 2^t$$. This matches D exactly.
